title: Outlook Automation - Create draft

posts.author: StrictLine (StrictLine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sometimes it’s better if a human intervention is possible before sending the email. Current Outlook/Gmail automations provide only the action to send the email immediately.

I’ve already developed EWS integration for another application, where the new Email just got “saved” (stored) in the WellKnownFolder.Drafts folder, so I really cannot imagine, that this enhancement would be a big deal.
